title: A secure password should be used when connecting to a database
description: This rule checks if the password used for database connection is hardcoded or weak.
message: Hardcoded or weak password detected in database connection.
recommendation: Use environment variables or secure password management tools.

compliant.code: import os; db = psycopg2.connect(dbname='mydb', user='myuser', password=os.environ['DB_PASSWORD'])

why_is_this_an_issue: Hardcoded passwords and weak passwords are vulnerable to unauthorized access.
how_to_fix: Replace hardcoded passwords with environment variables or secure password management tools.
